title: sphaerostephanos taiwanensis
intro: Sphaerostephanos taiwanensis, commonly known as the Taiwan fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine in Taiwan and is valued for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The therapeutic actions of Sphaerostephanos taiwanensis include wound healing, reducing fever, and alleviating pain, due to its bioactive constituents such as flavonoids and phenolic acids.
